reviews.review_title: game is worse than it was before
reviews.review_description: they literally just deleted primal fear and made og chimplab like it was a new game

Hello ladies and gentlemens, this used to be primal fear owned by Sylix and Monkii. If you noticed they published a new game on this page. Why the heck is it not primal fear no more? There has been a owner transfership to truffle since due to bts stuff.. Pls enjoy this new game they have cooked up for you members, I will be active all the time in-game moderating servers. You can come say hi!

Alright. Don’t wanna be rude but the developers lied to us all. They said they were making a game JUST LIKE primal fear and this is not like it at all. Iam sure everyone can agree the old game was better and I am now actually really sad because no one from before will ever be able to experience the primal fear we all loved. I am sure the all the og players here know what it was like swimming in lvl 3 or even running and finding the code in lvl 2 but now all those memories are gone along the game. I hope that someday the people realize what I am saying is true and maybe reach out to the devs and get them to bring back the only evacuation Vr or primal fear that actually made people scream in fear and fun and made people truly like the game as it once was. Devs I know all spent a lot of time making new and revamps for games but really realize the happiness of the people went down so horrendously that I am not sure how you guys don’t notice it yet. Please I hope you bring back what the game as it once was and bring back the memories that we all made from Evacuation Vr.

-Meta_Monke694
The game is amazing the owners are always online moderating the game and other people are enjoying the game
Cuz they just published the game :D I don’t have any criticisms for now so… please DONT DRING DIDDY HERE

Like I said in the title, really good, but I have 1 main issue. The map is way too small. I saw 1 review saying that it was better than scary baboon, but I bed to differ. the map there is much bigger and they at least give you the chance of survival. Here it's one really small maze and 2 monsters that you can't escape from it's annoying + you can't see anything. Make it a little brighter and make the map bigger.

reviews.review_title: cant join public or private servers
reviews.review_description: cant join servers and neither private servers but its still a good game

I give the game a solid 7.75 out of 10 . Heres my review.
Graphism: 9/10 amazing even for a gtag knock off.
Content:6/10 too short but it's only the beginning 
Monsters: 8.5/10 they are gorgeous and are original
Vibe:10/10, were like in some scientist /backroom lab with experiment on some biome
Community:7/10 it's like a gtag community so itd often kids but some people are cool
Gameplay:7.5/10, gtag movement and some searching of clue to open next level 
Lobby: 6/10 not much things to do there so you have to get to the point at the beginning.

reviews.review_title: Honestly is better than scary baboon

I love this game and it has amazing graphics and when you die the audio doesn’t kill your ears so it’s awesome. Especially the killers which are amazing, one thing is idk if you guys are working on level three but I don’t know how to beat it. Overall it is a truly amazing game and I definitely 
recommend . Also make me a moderator because I will be cool.

reviews.review_title: THIS TEENAGER HELPED ME COMPLETE LEVL 1
reviews.review_description: The game is a nice horror game to play with friends. It is perfect for people that like gorilla tag  and horror

I have played this game since it was an apk download on discord and I have seen it release on applab. Even the new level 2 is cool. So now I'm gonna get to my point. In level 2 you have to scower the WHOLE MAP to get to the next level. And you might say: "But you have to find the generators in level 1!" well I know that but atleast it isn't as bad as searching the whole map FOR PAGES WITH A NUMBER OF A CODE. Why!? Is this "Cool" is this a "Good puzzle"!? No! It isn't! It's like paying to listen to one song. IT GETS EVEN WORSE WHEN YOU CANT SEE SH*T! And you might say: "Well it supposed to be scary!" I KNOW BUT MAKING SOMETHING SCARY WHILE TRYING TO FIND A CODE DOESN'T MAKE IT BETTER! And when I DID get into level 3... IT WAS BORING! I wasted all that time for nothing! If you're gonna make another level atleast make it not boring and not make it ACCESSIBLE WITH ONLY A CODE!!! 2 Stars. Ruined my night.

Staff are VERY easy to stalk
